So, putting this together: Maybe starting an hour earlier at 7:00 AM and finishing at 6:00 PM as before would allow me to capture more early morning orders. Alternatively, keeping the start time the same but extending the finish time to 7:00 PM to cover the evening rush.

However, I should also consider whether other riders who ranked higher in distance and orders started earlier or later. If they started at 7:00 AM, then perhaps aligning my schedule with theirs could help me compete better.

Given that my earnings were slightly better than orders and distance, perhaps optimizing for peak times by starting at 7:00 AM to cover the early rush and then extending to 7:00 PM for the evening rush. That would give me a longer shift but potentially higher earnings.
